title: cynoglossum oblongifolium
intro: Cynoglossum oblongifolium, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species native to China, characterized by its small blue or white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Cynoglossum oblongifolium include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to relieve pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum oblongifolium is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
